name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$11.7100, stop A$10.7019, target A$14.1259 (2.40:1) — then trail it.
